name: Tugcelik Aluminyum Ve Metal Mamulleri Sanayi Ve Ticaret A.S.
summary: Tug√É¬ßelik Al√É¬ºminyum Ve Metal Mamulleri Sanayi Ve Ticaret A.S. produces and sells aluminum die casting parts in Turkey. The company also engages in the melting, die casting, mold production, CNC machining, and other production activities.
